questions.question: The Linear Sequential Model, also known as the ________ model, follows a sequential flow from requirements analysis to maintenance.
In Agile processes, the focus is on delivering ________ increments of the product through iterative cycles.
The process of evaluating a system or its components with the intent to find whether it satisfies the specified requirements is known as ________
The need of a Software Requirement Specification (SRS) document is to ensure that ________
options: all stakeholders have a clear understanding of the requirements
the coding is done before planning

questions.question: Choose the correct statement: One of the major responsibilities of a software project manager is to ________
options: write all the code for the project

questions.question: The design concept that focuses on breaking down a system into smaller, manageable modules is called ________
The process of managing changes to software is called ________
In software design, ________ refers to the degree to which the elements inside a module belong together.
